name: axon-copilot
description: Connect GitHub Copilot to your local Axon RAG knowledge base

chatParticipants.name: axon
chatParticipants.description: Ask questions answered by your local Axon RAG knowledge base. Uses the same backend synthesis as axon_queryKnowledge — consistent behavior, no separate Copilot step.

languageModelTools.name: axon_searchKnowledge
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve raw document chunks from the Axon knowledge base. Use this first for exploratory or discovery tasks (e.g. 'find the latest ticket', 'list incidents') â€” set topK=20 or higher for broad searches. Prefer this over axon_queryKnowledge when you need to inspect multiple documents before synthesising an answer.

topK.description: Number of chunks to return (default 5). Use 20+ for broad discovery.

threshold.description: Minimum similarity score 0.0â€“1.0 (default 0.3). Lower to 0.1 if search returns no results.

filters.description: Optional metadata filters, e.g. {"source": "https://..."}. Narrows results to chunks matching the filter.

project.description: Expected active project. Returns 409 if it does not match the brain's current active project. Use axon_switchProject first to change projects.

languageModelTools.name: axon_queryKnowledge
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a synthesised answer from the local Axon RAG knowledge base. Uses the same backend generation path as the @axon chat participant. Use this when the question is well-defined and a direct answer is needed. For discovery tasks (finding the latest item, listing incidents), use axon_searchKnowledge first.

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve for context (default uses global setting; increase for broad questions)

filters.description: Optional metadata filters for retrieval, e.g. {"source": "https://..."}.

project.description: Expected active project. Returns 409 if it does not match the brain's current active project. Use axon_switchProject first to change projects.

languageModelTools.name: axon_ingestText
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Ingest a raw text snippet into the Axon knowledge base.

project.description: Target project namespace. Omit to use the active project. Returns 409 if it does not match the brain's current active project.

languageModelTools.name: axon_ingestUrl
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetch and ingest a web page into the Axon knowledge base.

project.description: Target project namespace. Omit to use the active project. Returns 409 if it does not match the brain's current active project.

languageModelTools.name: axon_ingestPath
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Ingest a local directory or file into the Axon knowledge base. Returns a job_id immediately â€” ingestion runs in the background. Always call axon_getIngestStatus with the returned job_id and wait until status is 'completed' before searching. Accepts any absolute path on the local machine (e.g. /home/user/docs or C:\Users\user\docs) or a path relative to the workspace root.

path.description: The local file or directory path to ingest

languageModelTools.name: axon_getIngestStatus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Poll the status of a background ingest job started by axon_ingestPath. Returns 'processing', 'completed', or 'failed'. Always call this after axon_ingestPath and wait for 'completed' before running searches.

languageModelTools.name: axon_listProjects
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all available Axon knowledge base projects. Call this first if search returns no results â€” the data may be in a different project (e.g. 'engineering' or 'research'). Then use axon_switchProject to switch context.

languageModelTools.name: axon_switchProject
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Switch the active Axon knowledge base project. All subsequent searches and queries will run against the new project. Use after axon_listProjects discovers that relevant documents are in a non-default project.

name.description: The project name to switch to (e.g. 'engineering', 'research', 'default')

languageModelTools.name: axon_createProject
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a new knowledge base project in Axon.

name.description: The name of the new project

languageModelTools.name: axon_deleteProject
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete an existing Axon project and all its stored data.

name.description: The name of the project to delete

languageModelTools.name: axon_deleteDocuments
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove specific document(s) from the active project using their IDs.

docIds.description: List of document IDs to delete

languageModelTools.name: axon_getCollection
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all ingested files and total chunk counts in the active project.

languageModelTools.name: axon_clearCollection
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Wipe all data from the active project's vector store and index.

languageModelTools.name: axon_updateSettings
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Modify Axon RAG retrieval settings for the current session. Changes are not persisted to config.yaml.

rerank.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking of retrieved chunks

multi_query.description: Enable multi-query retrieval (3 rephrased queries merged)

step_back.description: Enable step-back prompting (abstract query before retrieval)

query_decompose.description: Enable query decomposition into atomic sub-questions

compress_context.description: Enable LLM context compression before generation

raptor.description: Enable RAPTOR hierarchical summary nodes during retrieval

graph_rag.description: Enable GraphRAG entity-graph expansion during retrieval

sentence_window.description: Enable sentence-window retrieval (expands chunks with surrounding sentences)

sentence_window_size.description: Number of surrounding sentences to include on each side (default 2)

crag_lite.description: Enable CRAG-lite corrective retrieval (re-queries on low-confidence chunks)

code_graph.description: Enable code graph retrieval (uses code symbol graph for code-related queries)

graph_rag_mode.description: GraphRAG query mode: "local" (entity neighbourhood), "global" (community summaries), or "hybrid"

discussion_fallback.description: Allow general-knowledge fallback when no relevant chunks are found (default false for tools)

cite.description: Include inline source citations in generated answers

languageModelTools.name: axon_shareProject
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate an HMAC share key that lets another user access one of your projects. Returns a share_string to send to the grantee out-of-band (email, Slack, etc.) and a key_id for future revocation. Requires AxonStore mode â€” call axon_initStore first.

project.description: Name of the project to share (must exist in your AxonStore)

grantee.description: OS username of the recipient on the shared filesystem

languageModelTools.name: axon_redeemShare
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Redeem a share string received from another user to create a mount descriptor in your mounts/ directory. After redemption the shared project appears in your project list as mounts/{owner}_{project} and can be queried.

share_string.description: The base64-encoded share string received from the project owner

languageModelTools.name: axon_revokeShare
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Revoke a previously issued share key by key_id. The grantee's mount will be removed on their next access. Use axon_listShares to find the key_id to revoke.

key_id.description: The key_id of the share to revoke (e.g. sk_a1b2c3d4). Get it from axon_listShares.

languageModelTools.name: axon_listShares
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all active shares for the current user. Returns 'sharing' (projects this user has shared with others, with revocation status) and 'shared' (projects others have shared with this user, with mount names). Use to audit access or troubleshoot missing shared projects. Requires AxonStore mode â€” call axon_initStore first if not yet initialised.

languageModelTools.name: axon_initStore
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Initialise AxonStore multi-user mode at a given base directory. Must be called once before share-related tools (axon_listShares) will work. Safe to call repeatedly. After calling this, AxonStore is active and sharing tools become available.

base_path.description: Absolute path to the directory where AxonStore/ will be created (e.g. '/data' creates '/data/AxonStore/<username>/')

languageModelTools.name: axon_showGraph
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Open the Axon graph panel for a query. Shows the answer, source citations, and the entity/relationship graph. Use when the user asks to 'show the graph', 'visualise', or 'see connections' for a topic.

query.description: The question or topic to visualise

languageModelTools.name: axon_ingestImage
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Describe an image file (PNG, JPG, JPEG, BMP, TIFF, WEBP) using Copilot's multimodal vision model, then ingest the description into the Axon knowledge base. Requires a Copilot model with image support (e.g. GPT-4o, Claude 3.x). The image path must be an absolute local path accessible to VS Code.

imagePath.description: Absolute path to the image file (PNG, JPG, JPEG, BMP, TIFF, or WEBP)

project.description: Target project namespace. Omit to use the active project.

languageModelTools.name: axon_refreshIngest
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Re-ingest tracked files whose content has changed since the last ingest. Returns counts of re-ingested, unchanged, missing, and errored files. Use after editing source files to keep the knowledge base current without re-ingesting everything.

languageModelTools.name: axon_listStaleDocs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return documents that have not been re-ingested within N calendar days. Use to identify which parts of the knowledge base are outdated and may need refreshing. Pair with axon_refreshIngest to update stale sources.

days.description: Age threshold in days. Documents older than this are returned. Default: 7.

languageModelTools.name: axon_clearKnowledgeBase
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Clear the entire vector store and BM25 index for the current project. This is destructive and cannot be undone â€” all ingested documents for the active project are removed. Use only when a full re-ingest is intended.

languageModelTools.name: axon_showGraphStatus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return the current GraphRAG community build status: community_build_in_progress (bool) and community_summary_count (int). Use to check whether community summaries are ready before running a global-mode query.

languageModelTools.name: axon_getSettings
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the current active Axon configuration: retrieval flags (top_k, rerank, hybrid, hyde, etc.), RAG mode settings (sentence_window, crag_lite, graph_rag_mode), and generation settings (llm_provider, llm_model, temperature). Use when the user asks what settings are active or wants to inspect before changing them.

languageModelTools.name: axon_finalizeGraph
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Trigger a community rebuild on the Axon knowledge graph. Rebuilds community summaries used for global-mode GraphRAG queries. Returns the number of community summaries generated. Run after ingesting a large batch of documents or when community_summary_count is 0.

commands.title: Axon: Refresh â€” Re-ingest Changed Files

axon.apiBase.description: Base URL of the Axon REST API server.

axon.apiKey.description: Optional API key for Axon (matches RAG_API_KEY on the server). Set this in your User settings (not Workspace) to avoid committing secrets to source control.

axon.topK.description: Number of knowledge base chunks to retrieve per query.

axon.autoStart.description: Automatically start the Axon API server when VS Code opens (Linux/macOS).

axon.graphSynthesis.description: When showing the knowledge graph, also call POST /query to synthesise an answer. Disable this if your LLM is slow or unavailable — the graph still renders without it.

axon.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter that has Axon installed. Leave empty for auto-detection: the extension checks ~/.axon/.python_path (written by the axon CLI on first run), then the pipx venv, then .venv/venv in the workspace, then system Python.

axon.useCopilotLlm.description: Use GitHub Copilot's Language Model as the primary LLM provider for Axon. This enables RAPTOR and GraphRAG ingestion without needing a local Ollama instance.

axon.ingestBase.description: Restrict ingestion to paths under this directory (sets RAG_INGEST_BASE on the server). Leave empty to allow any local path (default). Set to a specific directory to limit where the server can read files from.

axon.storeBase.description: Base path for AxonStore (e.g. /data or ~/axon-data). When set, all projects are stored under <storeBase>/AxonStore/<os-username>/. Leave empty for single-user mode (~/.axon/projects).
